article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 15, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Bank (BB) today announced 'cautiously accommodative' Monetary Policy Statement (MPS) for the second half of the current fiscal year 2022-23 (H2FY23).

"BB's monetary and credit programs for H2FY23 will pursue a cautiously accommodative policy stance to contain inflationary and exchange rate pressures, support desired economic growth, ensuring the necessary flow of funds to the economy's productive and employment generating activities," said BB Governor Abdu

llm_connections.evidence_quote: pursue a cautiously accommodative policy stance to contain inflationary and exchange rate pressures
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states the central bank's H2FY23 policy will 'contain ... exchange rate pressures', addressing country-level exchange-rate volatility consistent with the feature's scope.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: dissuade imports of non-essential commodities to reduce the exchange rate pressure
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article links discouraging non-essential imports directly to reducing 'exchange rate pressure', which speaks to aggregate exchange-rate dynamics as defined by the feature.
